_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify and direct the remediation of technical problems encountered during testing and implementation of new systems (e.g., identify and find work-arounds for communication protocols that are not interoperable).
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-A-002 (DQ, cosine: 0.558), DQ-T-016 (DQ, cosine: 0.495).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.679). Shared vocabulary: [identify, problems, technical]. DCWF-only terms [arounds, communication, direct, encountered, find, implementation] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, application, causes, code, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.869, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 28-word DCWF element and 29-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Identify and direct the remediation of technical problems encountered during tes" and "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.623 < STS 0.679 (gap -0.056). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [arounds, communication, direct] and [ability, across, application] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.6%. Shared tokens: [identify, problems, technical]. DCWF-only: [arounds, communication, direct, encountered, find, implementation]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, application, causes, code, data].
